reviews.review_description: It's a wave zombie shooter. it's not too hard, which is fine, cause otherwise it would not fun. it is fun, you do get to shoot zombies, decent, graphics, good for kids, no regrets spending .49 cents , gladly support the dev on this deal . maybe it will be updated

I’m not a big gamer, but I do love shooting games and this is no exception.  This game doesn’t have awesome graphics, but the zombies are kind of funky and funny.  It’s pretty funny how the zombie with pigtails bops towards you.  Pretty fun game!

developer_response.body: Hi nikkitucek, Thank you very much for your review nice to know you liked it.
